title: Six Election Priorities | Lewis Cocking
meta_description: I pledged to fight on 6 big issues if I was elected. These now form the basis for my work as your Member of Parliament for Broxbourne.
headings: h2: An update on my priorities
h2: One year as your MP
h2: Speaking about local issues on my first podcast
text_excerpt: Six Election Priorities | Lewis Cocking Skip to main content Lewis Cocking MP Main navigation Home About Me News My Priorities In Parliament Contact Surgeries Lewis Cocking MP Six Election Priorities Tweet I pledged to fight on 6 big issues if I was elected. These now form the basis for my work as your Member of Parliament for Broxbourne. Find out more . News An update on my priorities Monday, 5 January, 2026 Happy New Year! At the General Election, I committed to work on six overarching local priorities. One year as your MP Friday, 4 July, 2025 Looking back on my first 12 months. Speaking about local issues on my first podcast Tuesday, 8 April, 2025 Discussing my campaigns to tackle roadworks, improve access to local services and secure a Banking Hub in Cheshunt.
